welcome_offer.description: Earn 125,000 bonus points after you spend $6,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening.

annual_credits.name: Travel Credit
annual_credits.description: $300 in statement credits for travel purchases each account anniversary year.

annual_credits.name: The Edit Credit
annual_credits.description: $250 credit from Jan-Jun and $250 from Jul-Dec for prepaid bookings with The Edit (2-night min).

annual_credits.name: Dining Credit
annual_credits.description: $150 credit from Jan-Jun and $150 from Jul-Dec for Sapphire Exclusive Tables on OpenTable.

annual_credits.name: Apple TV/Music
annual_credits.description: Complimentary Apple TV and Apple Music subscriptions through 6/22/2027.

annual_credits.name: StubHub Credits
annual_credits.description: $150 credit from Jan-Jun and $150 from Jul-Dec for StubHub/viagogo.

other_benefits.name: Priority Pass Select
other_benefits.description: Complimentary Priority Pass Select Membership for lounge access.

other_benefits.name: Sapphire Lounge Network
other_benefits.description: Access to Chase Sapphire Lounges by The Club.

other_benefits.name: Reserve Travel Designer
other_benefits.description: Personalized service valued at up to $300 per trip.

other_benefits.name: Points Transfer
other_benefits.description: 1 to 1 value to leading airline and hotel partners.
